name: Implement .nameforma world for project serialization

plannedActions.name: Create World class (pkg/nameforma/src/world.mjs) with save/load/list/delete methods and entity file naming
Implement world discovery: findWorld(startPath) static method searches up to / for .nameforma/
Update TaskCommand: accept -w/--world parameter, eager load World, use World instead of in-memory Map
Add entity property to Task class
Create test/cli/task.mjs tests with isolated temp worlds in /tmp
Create CLI test helpers (pkg/nameforma/test/cli/helpers.mjs) for temp world creation and cleanup

references.text: World class hierarchy: World (abstract) - handles discovery (findWorld), directory management, save/load/list/delete. TaskWorld (concrete) - registers Task entity. All entities must be Avro-serializable with static SCHEMA property. World.register(entityType, EntityClass) reads EntityClass.SCHEMA for serialization.

.nameforma world design: one world per project in .nameforma/ directory. Storage structure: .nameforma/{entity}/{id}.json where entity comes from Entity.entity property (e.g., 'task'). CLI finds project root by searching up for .nameforma/. Tests use -w parameter to create isolated temp worlds in /tmp. Only concrete entities with entity property are persisted (Task only, not abstract Forma/Schema). World auto-created on first use.
Implementation language: World and TaskWorld must be TypeScript (.ts files). TaskCommand integration to TypeScript is deferred to separate CLI task.

Implementation scope for Claude clone: (1) Create World class to manage .nameforma/ directory, (2) Implement world discovery (search up tree for .nameforma/), (3) Add -w/--world parameter to TaskCommand, (4) Modify TaskCommand to load/save tasks from world instead of in-memory Map, (5) Create test/cli/task.mjs tests (currently skipped, waiting for context isolation), (6) CLI test helpers to create temp worlds for isolation.

World directory discovery: search up filesystem tree to / (not just to git root). Create .nameforma/ parent on World instantiation, entity subdirectories (.nameforma/{entity}/) on-demand when first entity of that type is saved. TaskWorld creates .nameforma/task/ subdirectory.

summary: Create World class to manage .nameforma/ directory structure for persistent task storage
